descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-2 to win the Centennial Cup in Saskatchewan.
descriptionLong: Coach Orland Kurtenbach's Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-2 Saturday night in Humboldt, Saskatchewan to clinch the Centennial Cup, Canada's tier-two junior hockey championship. The victory capped a remarkable playoff run in which the Sockeyes won 27 of 34 games and captured five titles including the Centennial Cup. Jason Phillips scored a hat trick in the final game and earned tournament MVP honors, while goaltender Frank Romeo also received major individual awards.

attribution.headline: CANADIAN PRESS CHAMPAGNE SHOWER anoints Richmond Sockeyes coach Orland Kurtenbach
